final:
module down_counter (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            q <= q - 1;
        end
    end
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= q + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
